
Selectivity and Growth {data-navmenu="Model"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Selectivity at Age

```{r sel_age, eval=!is.null(mv$selectivity_at_age)}
mv_plot_selectivity(
  df     = mv$selectivity_at_age,
  by_sex = length(sexes) > 1,
  title  = "Selectivity at Age"
)
```

### Selectivity at Length

```{r sel_len, eval=!is.null(mv$selectivity_at_length)}
# sel-at-length: curves by fleet
sal <- mv$selectivity_at_length
sal_fleets <- unique(sal$fleet)
fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = sal_fleets)

p <- plot_ly()
for (fl in sal_fleets) {
  sub <- sal[sal$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
  # Average across sexes for overlay
  avg <- tapply(
    X = sub$est, INDEX = sub$length,
    FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE
  )
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = as.numeric(names(avg)),
    y = as.numeric(avg),
    name = fl,
    line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      fl, " len %{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Length"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Selectivity"
lay$title <- "Selectivity at Length"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Selectivity Surface

```{r sel_surface, eval=!is.null(mv$selectivity_surface)}
surf_fleets <- unique(mv$selectivity_surface$fleet)

if (length(surf_fleets) == 1) {
  mv_plot_surface(
    df    = mv$selectivity_surface,
    ylab  = "Age",
    xlab  = "Year",
    title = paste0(surf_fleets[1], " selectivity")
  )
} else {
  plot_list <- list()
  for (fl in surf_fleets) {
    sub <- mv$selectivity_surface[
      mv$selectivity_surface$fleet == fl, ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    p <- mv_plot_surface(
      df    = sub,
      ylab  = "Age",
      xlab  = "Year",
      title = fl
    )
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
  }
  subplot(
    plot_list,
    nrows  = length(plot_list),
    shareX = TRUE,
    margin = 0.08
  ) |> modelVis::mv_config()
}
```

### Release Probability

```{r rel_prob, eval=!is.null(mv$release_probability)}
mv_plot_selectivity(
  df     = mv$release_probability,
  by_sex = length(sexes) > 1,
  ylab   = "Release probability",
  title  = "Release Probability at Age"
)
```

### Growth Transitions

```{r growth_trans, eval=!is.null(mv$size_transition)}
gt   <- mv$size_transition
stp  <- mv$size_transition_params   # NULL for non-siscaL models

# Trim bins to start at hypo$recLen (recruit bin from control file)
all_bins <- sort(unique(c(gt$from_length, gt$to_length)))
rec_lb   <- if (!is.null(stp) && !is.null(stp$rec_len)) stp$rec_len else -Inf
bins     <- all_bins[all_bins >= rec_lb]
n_l      <- length(bins)

gt_stocks <- if ("stock" %in% names(gt) && length(unique(gt$stock)) > 1L)
               unique(gt$stock) else NULL
gt_sexes  <- unique(gt$sex)

bin_step   <- if (n_l > 1L) min(diff(bins)) else 1
src_width  <- 0.6  * bin_step   # grey source indicator bar width
bar_width  <- 0.3  * bin_step   # coloured transition bar width
sex_offset <- 0.15 * bin_step   # ± x offset separating male/female bars

make_gt_panel <- function(stk, p_idx) {
  sub_stk <- if (!is.null(stk)) gt[gt$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else gt

  make_mat <- function(sx) {
    sub <- sub_stk[sub_stk$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
    mat <- matrix(0, nrow = n_l, ncol = n_l)
    for (r in seq_len(nrow(sub))) {
      ri <- match(sub$to_length[r],   bins)
      ci <- match(sub$from_length[r], bins)
      if (!is.na(ri) && !is.na(ci)) mat[ri, ci] <- sub$est[r]
    }
    mat  # mat[dest, source]
  }

  p <- plot_ly()

  # Dummy traces placed outside the fixed axis range so they are clipped from
  # the plot but still generate full-opacity legend entries.
  if (!is.null(stp) && p_idx == 1L) {
    ox <- min(bins) - 1e4   # x coordinate well outside visible range
    p <- add_lines(p = p, x = c(ox, ox + 1), y = c(-2, -1),
      line = list(color = "steelblue", dash = "dash", width = 1.5),
      name = "Linf (male)", showlegend = TRUE)
    p <- add_lines(p = p, x = c(ox, ox + 1), y = c(-2, -1),
      line = list(color = "salmon", dash = "dash", width = 1.5),
      name = "Linf (female)", showlegend = TRUE)
    p <- add_lines(p = p, x = c(ox, ox + 1), y = c(-2, -1),
      line = list(color = "#666666", dash = "longdash", width = 1.5),
      name = "L50", showlegend = TRUE)
    p <- add_lines(p = p, x = c(ox, ox + 1), y = c(-2, -1),
      line = list(color = "#666666", dash = "dot", width = 1.5),
      name = "Lrec", showlegend = TRUE)
  }

  p <- add_bars(
    p = p,
    x = bins, y = rep(0.8, n_l), base = as.numeric(0:(n_l - 1L)),
    width = rep(src_width, n_l),
    marker = list(color = "rgba(100,100,100,0.35)"),
    name = "Source", showlegend = (p_idx == 1L), hoverinfo = "skip"
  )

  sex_colours <- c("steelblue", "salmon")
  for (xi in seq_along(gt_sexes)) {
    sx      <- gt_sexes[xi]
    g_mat   <- make_mat(sx)
    offset  <- if (xi == 1L) -sex_offset else sex_offset
    x_bars  <- rep(bins + offset, n_l)
    base_b  <- rep(as.numeric(0:(n_l - 1L)), each = n_l)
    y_bars  <- 0.8 * as.vector(g_mat)
    src_len <- rep(bins, each = n_l)   # source bin length for each bar
    p <- add_bars(
      p = p,
      x = x_bars, y = y_bars, base = base_b,
      customdata = src_len,
      width = rep(bar_width, length(x_bars)),
      name = sx, marker = list(color = sex_colours[xi]),
      showlegend = (is.null(stk) || p_idx == 1L),
      legendgroup = sx,
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        sx, " src %{customdata:.0f}mm: P=%{y:.4f}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }

  shapes <- list()
  if (!is.null(stp)) {
    pi <- if (!is.null(stk)) match(stk, stp$stock_names) else 1L
    shapes <- list(
      list(type = "line", x0 = stp$Linf[1L, pi], x1 = stp$Linf[1L, pi],
           y0 = 0, y1 = n_l, line = list(color = "steelblue", dash = "dash",    width = 1.5)),
      list(type = "line", x0 = stp$Linf[2L, pi], x1 = stp$Linf[2L, pi],
           y0 = 0, y1 = n_l, line = list(color = "salmon",    dash = "dash",    width = 1.5)),
      list(type = "line", x0 = stp$l50[pi],       x1 = stp$l50[pi],
           y0 = 0, y1 = n_l, line = list(color = "#666666",   dash = "longdash",width = 1.5)),
      list(type = "line", x0 = stp$Linit[pi],     x1 = stp$Linit[pi],
           y0 = 0, y1 = n_l, line = list(color = "#666666",   dash = "dot",     width = 1.5))
    )
  }

  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title    <- "Length at time step i+1 (mm)"
  lay$yaxis$title    <- "Length at time step i (mm)"
  lay$yaxis$tickvals <- (0:(n_l - 1L)) + 0.5
  lay$yaxis$ticktext <- as.character(bins)
  lay$yaxis$range    <- c(0, n_l)
  lay$xaxis$range    <- c(min(bins) - 5, max(bins) + 5)
  lay$barmode        <- "overlay"
  lay$showlegend     <- TRUE
  lay$legend         <- list(itemclick = FALSE, itemdoubleclick = FALSE)
  lay$shapes         <- shapes
  if (!is.null(stk)) lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = stk))
  do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
}

stk_list <- if (!is.null(gt_stocks)) gt_stocks else list(NULL)
panels   <- lapply(seq_along(stk_list), function(i)
  make_gt_panel(stk_list[[i]], i))

n_panels <- length(panels)
if (n_panels == 1L) {
  modelVis::mv_config(panels[[1L]])
} else {
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(panels, list(
    nrows = 1L, shareX = FALSE, shareY = FALSE,
    titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.05,
    widths = rep(1 / n_panels, n_panels)
  )))
  p_out <- layout(p_out,
    legend = list(itemclick = FALSE, itemdoubleclick = FALSE))
  modelVis::mv_config(p_out)
}
```

### Discard Proportions at Age

```{r disc_comp, eval=!is.null(mv$discard_comp_fits)}
dc <- mv$discard_comp_fits
dc_fleets <- intersect(unique(dc$fleet), comm_fleets)
sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = sexes)

plot_list <- list()
for (fl in dc_fleets) {
  sub <- dc[dc$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
  # Average across years
  avg_list <- list()
  for (sx in sexes) {
    sx_sub <- sub[sub$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(sx_sub) == 0) next
    avg <- tapply(
      X = sx_sub$est, INDEX = sx_sub$age,
      FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE
    )
    avg_list[[sx]] <- data.frame(
      age = as.numeric(names(avg)),
      est = as.numeric(avg),
      sex = sx,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  if (length(avg_list) == 0) next
  avg_df <- do.call(what = rbind, args = avg_list)

  p <- plot_ly()
  for (sx in sexes) {
    sx_d <- avg_df[avg_df$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(sx_d) == 0) next
    p <- add_bars(
      p = p,
      x = sx_d$age, y = sx_d$est,
      name = sx,
      marker = list(
        color = sc[sx],
        line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
      ),
      legendgroup = sx,
      showlegend = (fl == dc_fleets[1]),
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        sx, " age %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }

  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = fl))
  lay$barmode <- "group"
  p <- do.call(
    what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
  )
  plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
}

if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
  p_out <- subplot(
    plot_list,
    nrows = length(plot_list),
    shareX = TRUE, shareY = TRUE,
    margin = 0.05
  )
  p_out <- layout(
    p = p_out,
    annotations = list(
      mv_bottom_label(label = "Age"),
      mv_left_label(label = "Mean discard proportion")
    )
  )
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
}
```
